case_title: MICHAEL CHARLES et al RESPONDENT VS. JENNY KONTOS APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: MINUTES FOR JUL-03-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT KONTOS, JENNY AS TO RESPONDENT CHARLES, MICHAEL KELLIHER, PAT HEARING SET FOR JUL-03-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
RECORD ON APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. APP. BY APPELLANT/DEFENDANT JENNY KONTOS IN PRO PER. NO APPEARANCE BY RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFFS PATRICK KELLIHER AND MICHAEL L. CHARLES. HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENTS, THE COURT FOUND IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT/DEFENDANT JENNY KONTOS AND AGAINST RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFFS PATRICK KELLIHER AND MICHAEL L. CHARLES, AND THAT RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFFS TAKE NOTHING. APPELLANT/DEFENDANT JENNY KONTOS AWARDED COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $45.00. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; MATTER WAS NOT REPORTED (503)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT KONTOS, JENNY TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT CHARLES, MICHAEL KELLIHER, PAT ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID RESPONDENT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
